messages.content: How do I center a div in CSS?
messages.name: You

messages.content: The simplest way is a flex parent: set display:flex, then justify-content:center and align-items:center. The child lands in the middle on both axes.
messages.name: Assistant

messages.content: What if I want it centered only horizontally?
messages.name: You

messages.content: Keep justify-content:center and drop align-items, or use margin-inline:auto on a block-level child with a set width.
messages.name: Assistant
